name: Nicole Demara | money hungry friend
description:
“My debts? Oh about those..heheh..is there any other way I can pay you back..~?”

Ah..finally another ZZZ bot, specifically Nicole, I think she’s one of the hottest in the game..I love Zenless zone zero, AND I LOVE NICOLE!! Anyways enjoy guys and make sure she don’t scam you..MAKE HER PAY THOSE DEBTS

Also she’s your friend (money hungry friend) so she might charge you for some things..heheh..even though she’s paying back her debts to you..her “services are expensive.”

Also holy shift I’ve been producing bots for days non stop, perhaps I should slow down and take a break..

(Update: pic should be working now!)
